characters.name: Alice Nimbletoes
characters.description: Alice Bridgette NimbletoesisAngelina's best friend and deuteragonist ofAngelina Ballerina, who is very skilled at gymnastics. She likesHenryand is usually happy. She's very clever. She often Alice  NimbletoesClassicAngelina Ballerina: The Next StepsBackground informationFirst appearance(s)Angelina in the WingsLast appearance(s)The Anniversary PartyFeature filmsAngelina Ballerina: The Show Must Go OnTelevision programsAngelina Ballerina (TV series)BooksAngelina and Alice (Book)VoiceJo WyattCharacter informationFull nameAlice Bridgette NimbletoesPersonalityoptimistic, enthusiastic, feisty, cheerful, kind, and has a "heart of gold".AppearanceShe is a light beige mouse with dark blue eyes. In The Next Steps, she is typically seen in a green long-sleeved leotard, a green waistcoat, a light turquoise tutu/skirt, a green hair bow, and green ballet slippers.OccupationAspiring gymnast and ballet student.AlignmentGoodAffiliationsBest friend to Angelina Ballerina; student at Miss Lilly's ballet school (and later Camembert Academy).GenderFemaleSpeciesMouselingAge(s)7 or 8 years oldLikesGymnastics: She is a highly skilled gymnast who loves cartwheels and handstands.Food: She has a big appetite and loves cheesy treats, cheese pie, and "cheesy mint balls".Activities: Ice-skating, playing the keyboard/piano, and dancing with AngelinaDislikesSmelly food, forgetting things, and not being able to make her friends happy.Powers and abilitiesExceptional gymnastics and acrobatic skills.PossessionsShe often carries a gym bagStatusAliveQuote"Hoop-dee-doo!", "Ooooh... it's the best fun ever!", "Squeak-a-doodle!"Source wears a green waistcoat as her primary outfit, a green tutu for ballet, a green hair bow, and green ballet slippers. Her favorite food is cheese pie. She also has a real sweet Tooth. Her favourite sweets are cheesy mint balls. She also appears inAngelina Ballerina: The Next Steps, where she is an aspiring gymnast, who is optimistic, enthusiastic, and always up for a new adventure. Kind, innocent, and with a heart of gold, Alice is a bit forgetful, but she tries harder than everyone else. She has a soft English-accented voice like Angelina. Her catchphrases are "Squeak-a-doodle!" and "Hoop-dee-doo!" Whenever Alice comes to Mouse City, the two are sure to put on a giggly show for Angelina's parents, just as they have done since they were the tiniest of mouselings. She wears a green long-sleeved dress, a hair bow, and ballet slippers. She can squeak and hum softly like Angelina, who hums softly. Jo Wyatt voices Alice.

characters.name: Angelina Mouseling
characters.description: Angelina Mouselingis the main protagonist of the shows of the same name. She was voiced by Finty Williams in the Classic series and Charlotte Spencer inThe Next Steps. Angelina MouselingClassicAngelina Ballerina: The Next StepsBackground informationFirst appearance(s)Angelina in the WingsLast appearance(s)The Anniversary PartyFeature filmsAngelina Ballerina: The Show Must Go OnAngelina's Princess DanceAngelina Sets SailTelevision programsAngelina Ballerina (TV series)BooksAngelina Ballerina (Book)VoiceFinty WilliamsCharacter informationFull nameAngelina Jeanette MouselingPersonalityfeisty, determined, and passionate.She can be a "drama queen," prone to crying or throwing tantrums when things do not go her way.Stubborn: She often exhibits a strong-willed and sometimes hot-headed attitude, especially regarding her dancing goals or changes she dislikes.AppearanceAngelina is a small, slender white-to-light-pink mouse with lavender purple eyes.OccupationBallerina TraineeAffiliationsFamily: Daughter of Maurice (a reporter) and Matilda Mouseling; older sister to Polly and cousin to Henry.Education: A student at Miss Lilly’s Ballet School in the original series and Camembert Academy under Ms. Mimi in The Next Steps.Close Friends: Her absolute best friend is Alice Nimbletoes, a gymnast. Other close allies include Marco (her love interest/crush), Gracie, Viki, A.Z., and William LongtaiGenderFemaleSpeciesMouselingsAge(s)7 or 8 years oldRelativesMaurice Mouseling(father)Matilda Mouseling(mother)Polly Mouseling(little sister)Grandma Sophia and Grandpa Jeffrey (paternal grandparents)Uncle Louis (paternal uncle)Henry Mouseling(little cousin)Aunt Lavender (aunt)Aunt Amanda (maternal aunt)Unnamed uncleUnnamed maternal cousinParentsMaurice Mouseling(father)Matilda Mouseling(mother)SiblingsPolly Mouseling(little sister)AlliesAlice NimbletoesWilliam LongtailEnemiesPriscilla & Penelope PinkpawsSammy WattsLikesDancing, balletDislikesThings not going her way, Priscilla, Penelope, and Sammy teasing her, arguments, her friends in trouble, Henry bothering her, getting framed, getting yelled at, losing things.Powers and abilitiesBallet Mastery: While she has no supernatural "powers," she possesses exceptional skill in ballet, alongside talent in tap, jazz, and classical dance.Possessionspink leotard, a dainty pink tutu with a red rose embellishment, a pink hair ribbon, and pink ballet slippers. Polka the Rag DollStatusAliveQuote"Absolutely, positively!""Really truly!""Stupendous!""Hoop-dee-doo!"Source Uncle Louis (paternal uncle)

characters.name: Anya Mousezauski
characters.description: Anya Mousezauskiis a young harvest mouse who comes toChipping Cheddaras part of a migrant family working through the harvest season. She is befriended by Angelina, and is a hate crime victim, where the twins accused her of theft, in whichPriscilla and Penelopewere the real perpetrators. She later joins Miss Lilly's ballet class. Anya's left ear is dark brown. She was teased by the Pinkpaws Twins, and initially Sammy as well, due to them making fun of her about it. She speaks with a Romanian accent and is voiced by Adrienne Posta. Anya onlyappearstwicethroughoutthe 2001 TV series.

characters.name: Arthur
characters.description: ArthurBackground informationFirst appearance(s)Arthur the ButterflyLast appearance(s)Arthur the ButterflyTelevision programsAngelina BallerinaSource Arthuris a pink and white butterfly thatAngelina Mouselingadopted inArthur the Butterfly. He was found with an injured leg, and Angelina adopted him and put him in a jar. When he recovered, she didn't want to let him go, butHenry Mouselinglet him go, but he still said goodbye with his friends.

characters.name: Arthur
characters.description: ArthurBackground informationFirst appearance(s)Arthur the ButterflyLast appearance(s)Arthur the ButterflyTelevision programsAngelina BallerinaSource Arthuris a pink and white butterfly thatAngelina Mouselingadopted inArthur the Butterfly. characters.name: Auntie Lavender
characters.description: Auntie Lavenderis Angelina and Polly's auntie, not seen but mentioned in the episodeAngelina and the Must-Have Bag, and her voice is heard over the phone, she was voiced by Finty Williams, who also voices Angelina and Mrs. Hodgepodge.

characters.name: Bobby
characters.description: Bobbyis one of the students from Camembert Academy. His name is mentioned in the episodeAngelina and Mrs. Mimi

characters.name: Doctor Tuttle
characters.description: Doctor Tuttleis the doctor in the town of Chipping Cheddar. Voiced byKeith Wickham.

characters.name: Eva the Diva
characters.description: Eva the DivaisAngelina's biggest fan.

characters.name: Gisela Quesillo
characters.description: Gisela Quesillo is a very kind mouse who deeply cares for her son. The major difference is that she wears a sky blue dress. She has Brown fur like her son. She is voiced by Susan Silo.

characters.name: Gracie Madeleine le Chateau
characters.description: Grace Madeleine "Gracie" le Chateauis one ofAngelina Mouseling's friends born inParis, France. She usually is meticulous and self-centered just to getMrs. Mimi'sattention. Gracie always loved to be in the spotlight, just like Angelina. She is also friends withViki Andrea Whiskerson,Adrian Zander James,Marco Fernando Quesillo,andAlice Nimbletoes. She speaks with a French accent and was voiced byJo Wyatt. sheAngelina Ballerina: The Next Stepsand one of the nine tritagonists of Disney'sAngelina Ballerina: The First Movie,Angelina in the Haunted Mansion,Angelina's New FriendandA Big Day at the Fair.Her catchphrase is "I can do it perfectly!" She is 10 years old and is from Paris, France.  She wears a yellow dress with a blue belt, a blue headband with a yellow flower on it, and blue ballet slippers. She has blue eyes as well!

characters.name: Henry Mouseling
characters.description: Henry Henry Tyler MouselingisAngelina's little cousin. He was voiced by Jo Wyatt. Henry is a bit sensitive, and doesn't like anything more startling than "boo". His sensitivity, young age, obsessions and slight klutziness combined with his big cousin having to watch him when his mother is busy make Angelina find him a bit annoying most of the times. She sometimes does not even like him. And she is usually seen shouting at him. So even Henry is afraid of her.  In the end, he truly does care about Angelina, looks up to her, and helps her and she also returns his affection.

characters.name: Henry Mouseling
characters.description: Henry Henry Tyler MouselingisAngelina's little cousin. He was voiced by Jo Wyatt. Henry is a bit sensitive, and doesn't like anything more startling than "boo". His sensitivity, young age, obsessions and slight klutziness combined with his big cousin having to watch him when his mother is busy make Angelina find him a bit annoying most of the times. She sometimes does not even like him. And she is usually seen shouting at him. So even Henry is afraid of her.  In the end, he truly does care about Angelina, looks up to her, and helps her and she also returns his affection.

characters.name: Ice Skating Coach
characters.description: Ice Skating Coachis Alice's coach in the episodeAngelina and Alice's Big Night. He wears a yellow shirt and grey trousers.

characters.name: Ivor Operatski
characters.description: Mr. Ivor Operatskiis a famous musician and director. He is voiced by Emmy award-winner, Sir Derek Jacobi. Mr. Operatski appears at first as an authoritative and short-tempered perfectionist who has little patience for mouselings, but Angelina helped him to show a warmer side to his angry personality, even going so far as to dress up as Father Christmas to get Henry to focus on his performance and atone for his shouting at him.[1]

characters.name: James
characters.description: Jamesis one of the students from Camembert Academy. His name is mentioned in the episodeAngelina and the Hip Hop Kid.

characters.name: Jason
characters.description: Jasonis AZ's neighbour. He is only mentioned in the episodeAngelina and Alice's Big Night.

characters.name: Lilly Mouseakova
characters.description: Miss Lilly Mouseakovais a ballet teacher toAngelina Mouselingand all her friends. She is voiced by Dame Judi Dench. Miss Lilly grew up inDacovia. She is sometimes mentioned inAngelina Ballerina: The Next Steps, and a picture of her is atCamembert Academy. In the episode "Angelina's New Home", it is mentioned that she is an old friend ofMs. Mimi. She is a ballet teacher toAngelina,Alice,William,the Pinkpaws, andHenry. Angelina is more than likely her favourite student. She is friends with professional dancers and even got Angelina and Henry parts as a magic fairy and a little elf, respectively. She speaks with a Russian accent. Miss Lilly is a wise and caring dance teacher who cares for all of her students.
characters.personality_section: Miss Lilly is a wise and caring dance teacher who cares for all of her students.

characters.name: Lilly Mouseakova
characters.description: Miss Lilly Mouseakovais a ballet teacher toAngelina Mouselingand all her friends. She is voiced by Dame Judi Dench. Miss Lilly grew up inDacovia. She speaks with a Russian accent. Miss Lilly is a wise and caring dance teacher who cares for all of her students.

characters.name: Louis Mouseling
characters.description: Uncle Louis MouselingisMaurice'sbrother,AngelinaandPolly'suncle andHenry'sfather. Voiced byRob Rackstraw.

characters.name: Marco
characters.description: Marco Fernando Quesillois 12 years old, andAngelina's third best friend. Marco is a music lover and loves playing and listening to music. His favorite instrument is the conga drums, and he loves to play very loudly; in some episodes, it was shown that Marco doesn't only play instruments but also dance. He is a bit accident-prone clumsy, is the joker/clown of Angelina's circle of friends, and secretly loves Angelina.

characters.name: Marco
characters.description: Marco Fernando Quesillois 12 years old, andAngelina's third best friend. Marco is a music lover and loves playing and listening to music. His favorite instrument is the conga drums, and he loves to play very loudly; in some episodes, it was shown that Marco doesn't only play instruments but also dance. He is a bit accident-prone clumsy, is the joker/clown of Angelina's circle of friends, and secretly loves Angelina.

characters.name: Matilda Mouseling
characters.description: Mrs. Matilda[1]Mouseling (née Fielding[2])is Angelina's loving - though sometimes frazzled and weary - mother. Her maiden surname is Fielding. She has a sister Amanda, who has a son. Supportive yet firm, she provides the voice of reason the young starlet Angelina needs. She wears a pink top and a blue shirt. She is voiced byJonell Elliot. (Emma TateinAngelina Ballerina: The Next Steps) According to the episode, "The Old Oak Tree," she and Maurice had their date on the 300-year-old oak tree that meant a lot to Angelina and all of her friends until Mrs. Pinkpaws tries to get rid of it because ofPriscilla's broken arm. The mouselings try to save it until the tree starts to collapse and turn into a playground.

characters.name: Matilda Mouseling

The mouselings try to save it until the tree starts to collapse and turn into a playground.

characters.name: Maurice Mouseling
characters.description: Maurice MouselingisAngelina's father and the proprietor of theMouseland Gazette(Now a reporter for theMouseland Herald). He speaks with an English accent. He was voiced byKeith WickhamandJames McAvoy. When Maurice andLouiswere young mouselings, they used to camp all the time. They hiked all the way to Rat's Tail Ravine and losthis father's favourite medal by pretending to be soldiers. They got lost and were chased by Big Paw right through the hollow.[1] As a young mouseling, Maurice won 1st prize four times at Miller's Pond boat carnival for decorating four beautiful boats.[2]

characters.name: Miss Quaver
characters.description: Miss Quaveris Miss Lilly's pianist and a character fromAngelina Ballerina. She is always nervous and plays the piano inMiss Lilly'sclass. Like Angelina, she is voiced byFinty Williams. Miss QuaverBackground informationFirst appearance(s)Angelina in the WingsLast appearance(s)The Show Must Go OnVoiced byFinty WilliamsCharacter informationFull nameMiss QuaverGenderFemaleSpeciesMouselingsPersonalityNervous but kindHard-workingSupportive of young dancersMusically talentedAppearanceRound glassesLight brown or grey furA green shawl or cape with floral patternsA calm, gentle facial expressionSitting at a wooden piano during dance classesAlliesLilly MouseakovaSource Miss Quaver is a resident of the fictional mouse town ofChipping Cheddar, where she works closely with Miss Lilly at the ballet school. The school is a central location in the series where young mice gather to learn classical ballet and practice dance routines.

characters.name: Mr. Chirpyface
characters.description: Mr. Chirpyface(-Squigglytail)isMrs. Mimi's own pet canary. He is a yellow bird.

characters.name: Mr. Hopper
characters.description: Mr. Hopperis a character Not seen but mentioned in the episodeAngelina and Alice's Big Night. Ms. Mimi mentions that he fixed the piano at Camebert Academy.

characters.name: Mr. Longtail
characters.description: Mr. Longtailis William's father who works as a cab driver and praises his son for any efforts he tries to make especially if its his first time.

characters.name: Mrs. Hodgepodge
characters.description: Mrs. HodgepodgeSourceMrs. Hodgepodgeis Angelina's next-door neighbor. She wears a blue ribboned hat and shawl and has a reputation for being very grumpy. She does not generally get on well with Mouselings. She has a great passion for gardening and cooking (although her cabbage jelly is left much desired). Despite her grumpiness, she is sensible, has good suggestions for solving problems and hides a much kinder side (the latter occasionally being shown either when she is caught in the act as per “Angelina the Mouse Detective” or when she and others find common ground such as in “The Old Oak Tree”). She made her debut in the 1983 bookAngelina Ballerinawhich is the first book inthe book series of the same name. In theTV Series, she speaks with a West Country Accent, and made her TV series debut in the episode"Arthur the Butterfly".

characters.name: Mrs. Pinkpaws
characters.description: Mrs. Pinkpawsis the mother of the twinsPriscilla and Penelopeand their baby brother. She appears in a couple of episodes. She speaks with a Southern accent and wears a lot of jewelery.

characters.name: Mrs. Thimble
characters.description: Mrs. Thimbleis the owner of the shop, which is across from Mr. Mouseling's music shop. She is Voiced byBeverly Klein. She is very helpful to her customers, offering alternatives when she's out of stock. She's also responsible for collecting second-hand items for donations.

characters.name: Mrs. Thimble
characters.description: Mrs. Thimbleis the owner of the shop, which is across from Mr. Mouseling's music shop. She is Voiced byBeverly Klein. She is very helpful to her customers, offering alternatives when she's out of stock. She's also responsible for collecting second-hand items for donations.

characters.name: Ms. Mimi
characters.description: Ms. Mimi Jane SquigglytailisAngelina Mouseling's ballet teacher and the headteacher of Camembert Academy. She is kind-hearted, caring, understanding, supportive, and good at advising her pupils.  Ms. Mimi wears a purple dress with matching leggings, turquoise ballet slippers, and a turquoise headband. She also has green eyes.

characters.name: Ms. Mimi
characters.description: Ms. Mimi Jane SquigglytailisAngelina Mouseling's ballet teacher and the headteacher of Camembert Academy. She is kind-hearted, caring, understanding, supportive, and good at advising her pupils.  Ms. Mimi wears a purple dress with matching leggings, turquoise ballet slippers, and a turquoise headband. She also has green eyes.

characters.name: Perry Parmesan
characters.description: Perry Parmesanis the lead actor inMouse In The City: The Musical.

characters.name: Polly Mouseling
characters.description: Polly MouselingClassicAngelina Ballerina: The Next StepsCharacter informationGenderFemaleLikesDancing, ballet, her sister AngelinaSourcePolly Mouselingis the second child and younger daughter ofMr.andMrs. Mouseling, and the little sister ofAngelina, and the second cousin ofHenry. InAngelina Ballerina: The Next Steps, Polly is a cute and pretty four-year-old girl mouse with a pinkish-white fur color in the reboot although she has brown fur and resembled a baby boy in the original series. She was voiced by Jo Wyatt in the original series and Leah Zabari in the reboot. Polly is energetic, happy, adorable, happy, go-lucky, fun-loving, and very lovely. Angelina loves her sister so much and is able to show her some basics of ballet. Although she is too young to do ballet, she still loves watching Angelina perform at her school. Polly is always going to be on her big sister's side.

characters.name: Polly Mouseling
characters.description: Polly MouselingClassicAngelina Ballerina: The Next StepsCharacter informationGenderFemaleLikesDancing, ballet, her sister AngelinaSourcePolly Mouselingis the second child and younger daughter ofMr.andMrs. Mouseling, and the little sister ofAngelina, and the second cousin ofHenry. InAngelina Ballerina: The Next Steps, Polly is a cute and pretty four-year-old girl mouse with a pinkish-white fur color in the reboot although she has brown fur and resembled a baby boy in the original series. She was voiced by Jo Wyatt in the original series and Leah Zabari in the reboot. Polly is energetic, happy, adorable, happy, go-lucky, fun-loving, and very lovely. Angelina loves her sister so much and is able to show her some basics of ballet. Although she is too young to do ballet, she still loves watching Angelina perform at her school. Polly is always going to be on her big sister's side.

characters.name: Princess Valentine
characters.description: Princess Valentineis the oldest daughter ofQueen Seraphina.

characters.name: Priscilla & Penelope Pinkpaws
characters.description: ThePinkpaws twinsrefers toPenelope PinkpawsandPriscilla Pinkpaws. They are twin sisters who tease and belittle nearly everyone, sometimes including each other. They are particularly jealous ofAngelinafor her dancing ability. They also have a baby brother.[1]Their bow and tutu colours are swapped, as Priscilla wears a violet tutu and pointe shoes but a lilac hair ribbon and Penelope wears a lilac tutu and pointe shoes but a violet hair ribbon. Their family is rich. Priscilla was voiced by Jo Wyatt (who also voicedAlice,HenryandSammy), while Penelope is voiced by Jonell Elliott (who also voiced Angelina's motherMatildaas well asPrincess Sophie, Ms. Chalk and Mrs. Pinkpaws, the latter of whom is Priscilla and Penelope's mother). The twins are very snobbish and jealous of Angelina's ballet skills and usually tease her. They would often fight each other. They're both very bratty, Priscilla more so than Penelope. However, to say that they are both entirely stingy and unfair - they were very grateful to Angelina when she and Alice rescued them from drowning in the river,[2]and their resentment towards Angelina[3]was justifiable to some degree as they, alongside Sammy (who is sometimes a friend and ally to them), and the other dancers were fed up of Angelina's constant demands and bad attitude towards them.

characters.name: Priscilla & Penelope Pinkpaws
characters.description: ThePinkpaws twinsrefers toPenelope PinkpawsandPriscilla Pinkpaws. They are twin sisters who tease and belittle nearly everyone, sometimes including each other. They are particularly jealous ofAngelinafor her dancing ability. They also have a baby brother.[1]Their bow and tutu colours are swapped, as Priscilla wears a violet tutu and pointe shoes but a lilac hair ribbon and Penelope wears a lilac tutu and pointe shoes but a violet hair ribbon. Their family is rich. Priscilla was voiced by Jo Wyatt (who also voicedAlice,HenryandSammy), while Penelope is voiced by Jonell Elliott (who also voiced Angelina's motherMatildaas well asPrincess Sophie, Ms. Chalk and Mrs. Pinkpaws, the latter of whom is Priscilla and Penelope's mother). The twins are very snobbish and jealous of Angelina's ballet skills and usually tease her. They would often fight each other. They're both very bratty, Priscilla more so than Penelope. However, to say that they are both entirely stingy and unfair - they were very grateful to Angelina when she and Alice rescued them from drowning in the river,[2]and their resentment towards Angelina[3]was justifiable to some degree as they, alongside Sammy (who is sometimes a friend and ally to them), and the other dancers were fed up of Angelina's constant demands and bad attitude towards them.

characters.name: Queen Seraphina
characters.description: Queen Seraphinais a childhood friend of MissLilly's, who is now the Queen of Mouseland. She might have been inspired by the late Princess Grace Kelly of Monaco and Princess Diana of the United Kingdom, also Queen Seraphina wears the same trademark sky-blue gown. Queen Seraphina's husband,King Ferdinand,is often referred to in the original book series. She speaks with a Victorian accent.

characters.name: Sammy Watts
characters.description: Sammy design Sammy Wattsis an older mouse at Angelina's school who often causes trouble for William and Angelina. He wears a yellow cap on his head, has a bad habit of teasing, and spends most of his time with his gang, including Spike. However, during tense moments Sammy works with Angelina[1]and does have a good heart. He shares Alice's interest in gymnastics.[2]He also dislikesthe Pinkpaws twins. His most prized possessions are possibly his yo-yo and his bicycle. Sammy first appeared in thebook seriesinAngelina Ice Skates, which was first published in 1993. In theTV series, he first appeared inMidnight Muddleand made his last TV appearance inAngelina's Princess Dance, and was voiced by Jo Wyatt, who gives him a faint but noticeable Cockney accent.

characters.name: Sophia and Jeffery Mouseling
characters.description: Grandma Sophia and Grandpa Jeffrey MouslingareAngelina,Henry, andPolly's grandparents andMauriceandLouis's parents. They make regular appearances inAngelina Ballerina, and are sometimes mentioned inAngelina Ballerina: The Next Steps. Jeffrey and Sophia voiced byKeith WickhamandAdrienne Postarespectively.
